description: Regression scenarios for plan mode guard hook: mode state clearing and idempotent safety.

assertions.context: Hook guards on .purlin existence for non-Purlin project safety
Hook checks PURLIN_SESSION_ID for PID-scoped mode files
Running the hook empties the current_mode file

assertions.pattern: hook succeeds with empty mode file
assertions.context: Hook exits 0 when mode file is already empty

assertions.pattern: hook succeeds with missing mode file
assertions.context: Hook exits 0 when mode file does not exist
